payload.long_description: Partial view of a large bed with a dark mahogany paneled headboard and matching low wooden base, dressed in a beige-gray striped duvet and two matching striped pillows; left side and lower edge are cropped by the image frame and the bed appears approximately 1.5 meters from the camera.
